expectations.text: Creates custom hook with proper naming (useXxx)
expectations.evidence: Creates useAuth, useLogin, and useLoginForm hooks, all following the useXxx naming convention. useLogin is placed in {hooksRoot}/apis/mutations/useLogin/index.ts, useAuth in app/(auth)/login/hooks/useAuth/index.ts.

Explicitly follows TDD workflow: Step 5 describes 'TDD Workflow - Copy Tests and Red Verification', Step 7 describes 'Run Tests (Green Verification)'. Includes full test files with Vitest, renderHook, AAA pattern, and Korean test descriptions per testing.md conventions.

expectations.text: Mentions API integration pattern (TanStack Query, fetch, mutation)
expectations.evidence: Uses TanStack Query useMutation for login API call (import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'), fetch for HTTP requests, and structures the hook as a mutation pattern in {hooksRoot}/apis/mutations/.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run for eval-15 demonstrates comprehensive adherence to the frontend-dev skill. It followed the full workflow including reference reading, hook placement rules, TDD cycle, naming conventions, and produced well-structured code with tests.
